params.description: Vertical bar graph appears. Single bar labeled Data ends at 45, between 40 and 50 gridlines. Bar highlighted. Ghost gridlines at 5s visible, showing halfway marks between each pair of labeled gridlines.

beats.text: This bar shows 45, between the lines. How did you figure that out during the lesson?
What strategy helped you find values between the lines?
options: I picked the line closest to the top of the bar
I added the two numbers on the lines

validator.description: Student selected the halfway strategy, recognizing the pattern that halfway between lines on scale 10 is always 5 more

beats.text: That's the pattern! Half of 10 is 5, so halfway between any two lines is 5 more than the lower line.

elements.description: Vertical bar graph in reading mode. Single Data bar at value 45, highlighted. Ghost gridlines visible at 5s between labeled gridlines at 10s.

beats.text: Knowing that pattern means you can read ANY bar graph with scale of 10, even values between the lines. That's a powerful strategy.

elements.description: Vertical bar graph in reading mode. Single Data bar at value 45, highlighted. Ghost gridlines visible at 5s.

beats.text: You learned to read values at the lines AND between the lines. You used half of 10 is 5 to figure out tricky values.
That pattern-finding will help you when we look at ALL the scales together next time. You'll be able to pick the best one for any data.

elements.description: Vertical bar graph in reading mode. Single Data bar at value 45, highlighted. Ghost gridlines visible at 5s.
